name: Laon Core
shortDesc: High grade engine oil for general automotive use. Dependable protection for everyday engines.
description: The Bagani Laon Core is a high-grade engine oil designed for general automotive applications. With SAE 40 viscosity and CF/SF certification, it delivers dependable protection for a wide range of engines.
description2: Proudly made in the Philippines — Gawang Pilipino, Para sa Pilipino! Built for reliability in everyday driving conditions.

features.title: Dual Certification
features.desc: CF/SF rated for both gasoline and diesel engine compatibility.

features.title: Versatile Protection
features.desc: Suitable for a wide range of automotive engines and operating conditions.

features.title: Anti-Sludge Formula
features.desc: Keeps engines clean by preventing sludge and deposit buildup.

features.title: Filipino-Made Quality
features.desc: Proudly manufactured in the Philippines for local driving conditions.

faqs.q: Can I use Laon Core in my car?
faqs.a: Yes, Laon Core is designed for general automotive use in both gasoline and diesel engines that require SAE 40 CF/SF oil.
For motorcycles, we recommend the Amihan product line which is specifically formulated with JASO ratings for motorcycle engines.

faqs.q: Where can I buy Bagani products?
faqs.a: Bagani oils are available at authorized shops, auto parts stores, and online marketplaces across the Philippines.
